description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SEQ_SWITCHED_SHUNT_DATA_3, and is implemented by a call to SEQ_SWITCHED_SHUNT_DATA_3. Use this API to modify the zero sequence data of an existing switched shunt in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Zero Sequence Switched Shunt Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, realaro = seq_switched_shunt_data(ibus, realari)

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying corresponding to values REALAR(1) through REALAR(8) as described above. (input).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of one elements specifying one element corresponding to value REALAR(9) as described above. (output).

realari.description: BZ1, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 1.
BZ2, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 2.
BZ3, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 3.
BZ4, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 4.
BZ5, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 5.
BZ6, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 6.
BZ7, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 7.
BZ8, zero sequence increment in MVAR per step for block 8.

realaro.description: present zero sequence switched shunt admittance in MVAR (returned).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Block has N zero and B non-zero. - Block has admittances with different signs in positive and zero sequences.
